trustedPartner: Your Trusted Partner in Industrial Transformation
industrialSolutions: We provide integrated industrial solutions including oil and fuel tank systems, industrial control panels, motion control systems, and Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT). We work with you from design and installation to operation and maintenance to ensure safe and reliable performance in production environments.
practicalExperienceDesc: Executing projects with local and international companies
standardCustomSolutionsDesc: Perfectly suited to your factory's needs
haveProjectOrInquiry: Do you have a project or inquiry?
willRespondSoon: and we will respond to you as soon as possible.

hero.title: Engineering Precision. Digital Intelligence. Industrial Impact.
hero.text: We combine advanced analytics, high-accuracy engineering, and smart software technologies to deliver end-to-end solutions that strengthen performance and unlock new opportunities.

text.paragraph_1: Be Control, founded in 2020, is a leading Syrian Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) company specializing in advanced industrial solutions.
text.paragraph_2: With decades of expertise in electronics, electrical power systems, and the information industry, Be Control integrates classic industrial control with modern technologies to deliver smart, reliable, and future-ready automation solutions.
text.paragraph_3: Our work spans industrial automation, IIoT integration, digital transformation, and custom-designed control systems built to meet the evolving needs of today’s industries.
text.paragraph_4: We are committed to innovation, quality, and long-term value for our clients.

engineering.title: Engineering Solutions
engineering.whatItIs: Our Engineering Division provides end-to-end design, analysis, and implementation support across mechanical, electrical, civil, and process engineering disciplines. We deliver innovative, safe, and reliable solutions that meet global industry standards.
problemSolved: Inefficient or outdated designs that slow down production
Lack of technical expertise for complex projects
High downtime caused by engineering errors or poor integration
Challenges meeting industry compliance and safety requirements
benefits: Optimized system performance and reduced operational costs
Engineering designs tailored to your exact workflows
Faster project delivery with minimal rework
Full compliance with international codes and standards

maintenance.title: Industrial Maintenance Services
maintenance.whatItIs: We provide preventive, corrective, and predictive maintenance services for industrial equipment and infrastructure. Using modern diagnostic tools and experienced technicians, we ensure uninterrupted operations and extended asset lifespan.
problemSolved: Frequent breakdowns and unscheduled downtime
Aging equipment that impacts productivity
High maintenance costs due to reactive repairs
Lack of skilled technicians for specialized machinery
benefits: Reduced downtime and increased reliability
Longer equipment lifespan
Lower maintenance cost through predictive strategies
Immediate technical support from certified experts

automation.title: Automation & Control Systems
automation.whatItIs: We design, integrate, and program advanced automation technologies including PLC, SCADA, DCS, IoT, and robotics. Our team delivers seamless control systems tailored to your operational needs.
problemSolved: Inefficient manual processes
High labor costs and human errors
Difficulty monitoring large or complex facilities
Lack of real-time data for decision-making
benefits: Increased productivity through automated workflows
Improved accuracy, consistency, and speed
Real-time monitoring and optimized resource usage
Scalable systems ready for Industry 4.0 transformation

epc.title: EPC Support
epc.whatItIs: We assist EPC contractors with engineering design, procurement coordination, site supervision, commissioning, and technical documentation. Our team provides expertise to ensure smooth project delivery.
problemSolved: Limited internal engineering resources
Complex multi-vendor procurement processes
Project delays due to poor coordination
Technical challenges during installation and commissioning
benefits: Faster project delivery with integrated support
Reduced cost through efficient procurement
Fewer errors and rework
Clear communication between all project stakeholders

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing Solutions
manufacturing.whatItIs: We offer specialized manufacturing solutions including production line optimization, process engineering, material handling systems, and lean manufacturing implementation.
problemSolved: Inefficient production lines causing bottlenecks
High waste and low product quality
Difficulty scaling production
Lack of visibility into manufacturing performance
benefits: Higher output with existing resources
Improved product quality and consistency
Reduced waste and operating costs
Streamlined workflows aligned with lean principles

safety.title: Safety & Compliance Services
safety.whatItIs: Our HSE specialists deliver safety audits, risk assessments, training programs, and compliance solutions aligned with local and international standards. We help companies build proactive safety cultures.
problemSolved: High-risk environments leading to accidents
Non-compliance with safety regulations
Lack of proper training for workers
Increased operational liability
benefits: Safer workplace with reduced incidents
Full compliance with regulatory authorities
Improved workforce awareness and performance
Stronger corporate reputation and reduced legal risks

oilGas.title: Oil & Gas
oilGas.content: We provide comprehensive engineering and technical support for upstream, midstream, and downstream operations. Our services focus on enhancing safety, optimizing asset performance, reducing downtime, and ensuring compliance with international industry standards.

chickenPoultry.title: Chicken Poultry
chickenPoultry.content: We support poultry farms and processing facilities with modern solutions that enhance animal welfare, improve biosecurity, optimize production efficiency, and reduce operational costs. Our expertise helps producers achieve consistent, high-quality output while maintaining strict hygiene and food-safety standards.

productionLines.title: Production Lines
productionLines.content: We deliver engineering, automation, and optimization solutions for a wide range of production lines. From equipment selection to layout design and process automation, we help manufacturers increase throughput, improve product quality, and minimize waste across their operations.

iiotProject.title: Smart IIoT Integration for Real-Time Production Monitoring
iiotProject.problem: The client lacked real-time visibility into machine performance, relied on manual data collection, and suffered from frequent unplanned downtime due to undetected equipment issues.
iiotProject.addedValue: By integrating IIoT sensors and a real-time monitoring platform, the client gained immediate visibility into machine performance, energy usage, and equipment health. This upgrade eliminated manual data collection, reduced unexpected downtime, and enabled predictive maintenance, resulting in higher efficiency and lower operational costs.

gasTankProject.title: Comprehensive Integrity Assessment & Safety Upgrade for Gas Storage Tank
gasTankProject.problem: The client faced significant safety concerns due to corrosion risks, outdated monitoring systems, and the urgent need to comply with updated industry safety regulations.
gasTankProject.addedValue: Through advanced inspection, ultrasonic testing, and safety system enhancements, the client improved the structural reliability and lifespan of their gas storage tank. The added value came from early detection of corrosion, upgraded monitoring controls, and full compliance with safety standards, significantly reducing risks and increasing operational safety.

certifications.description: International standard for occupational health and safety management.

certifications.description: Environmental management certification for sustainable industrial operations.

certifications.title: IEC 61508
certifications.description: Functional safety standard for electrical and electronic safety-related systems.
